title: calicotome spinosa proles infesta
intro: Calicotome spinosa proles infesta, also known as the spiny broom or broom thorn, is a shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the spiny broom is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can be found in some traditional Mediterranean remedies for its purported health benefits.
